channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: APK non vérifiés sur Android : Google nous prend vraiment pour des enfants
item.description: Le sideloading "libre", l'installation d'APK, sur Android vit peut-être ses dernières heures de simplicité. Sous couvert de lutte contre les arnaques, Google déploie un nouvel "Advanced Flow" qui transforme l'installation d'un simple APK en véritable marathon administratif numérique. Voici pourquoi cette mesure fait déjà grincer des dents.

item.title: Hurdle hints and answers for March 20, 2026
item.description: Hints and answers to today's Hurdle all in one place.

item.title: Moon phase today: What the Moon will look like on March 20
item.description: See the Moon phase expected for March 20, 2026 as well as when the next Full Moon is expected.

item.title: Grounds for celebration: these 6 coffee machine deals are too hard to resist in Afterpay Day sales
item.description: Whether you prefer a fully-automatic, manual or capsule coffee machine, there are plenty available at great prices for Afterpay Day.

item.title: 'It was very uncomfortable to shoot, we were all on egde': The Pitt season 2 star breaks down heartbreaking ICE storyline in episode 11
item.description: The Pitt season 2 episode 11 introduces a patient brought into the ER by ICE agents — and one star recalls how 'uncomfortable' the shoot quickly became.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 20, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 20, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 20, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1735 on March 20 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: OpenAI is putting ChatGPT, its browser and code generator into one desktop app
item.description: OpenAI is developing a “super app” for desktop that unifies ChatGPT, its browser and its Codex app, according to the Wall Street Journal and CNBC. A company spokesperson told the publications that OpenAI Chief of Applications Fidji Simo will lead the application revamp with assistance from OpenAI President Greg Brockman. Simo will also help the marketing team advertise the app when it comes out. OpenAI’s leadership is apparently hoping that combining several products can help it streamline user experience and dedicate its resources to one project. The company has yet to make an official announ...
